name: Apple Banana
description: Sweet, compact banana variety perfect for home gardens.

name: Strawberry Guava
description: Prolific tropical fruit, great fresh or in jam.

name: Papaya — Solo
description: Classic Hawaiian papaya. Fruits in under a year.

name: Breadfruit
description: Staple canoe plant. Starchy, versatile fruit.

name: Cacao
description: Grow your own chocolate. Thrives in Hamakua shade.

name: Starfruit
description: Beautiful ornamental fruit tree with sweet, tangy fruit.

name: Meyer Lemon
description: Sweeter than standard lemons. Great for containers.

name: Avocado — Sharwil
description: Premium Hawaiʻi avocado variety. Rich, buttery flavor.

name: ʻŌhiʻa Lehua
description: Sacred Hawaiian tree. Red blossoms support native pollinators.

name: Koa
description: Iconic Hawaiian hardwood. Fast-growing native reforestation tree.

name: Kukui
description: The candlenut tree — Hawaiʻi state tree. Shade and cultural significance.

name: Māmaki
description: Endemic Hawaiian plant. Makes wonderful herbal tea.

name: Turmeric
description: Fresh tropical turmeric. Far superior to dried.

name: Galangal
description: Thai ginger relative. Essential for Southeast Asian cooking.

name: Lemongrass
description: Fragrant culinary herb. Practically grows itself in Hawaiʻi.

name: Vanilla
description: Tropical orchid vine. Needs a host tree and patience.

name: Bird of Paradise
description: Iconic tropical flower. Dramatic orange and blue blooms.

name: Plumeria
description: Classic lei flower. Fragrant and easy to grow.

name: Heliconia — Lobster Claw
description: Stunning hanging tropical flowers. Hummingbird magnet.

name: Sweet Potato
description: Edible ground cover. Suppresses weeds, feeds families.

name: Pinto Peanut
description: Nitrogen-fixing living mulch. Yellow flowers, tough and spreading.

name: Comfrey
description: Dynamic accumulator and chop-and-drop mulch machine.
